name: app-template
description: A full-stack application template built on React 19 + Cloudflare Workers (Hono.js)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter worker build
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:web && sed -i '' "s/__APP_VERSION__/'$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")'/g" worker/wrangler.toml && cd worker && pnpm deploy && git checkout -- wrangler.toml
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter worker typecheck
